# techHind — Full Product & Platform Reference

> Complete Solar Management System for EPC companies in India

## What is techHind?

techHind Solar CRM is a complete Solar Management System for EPC companies, distributors, and integrators in India. It manages leads, projects, quotations, orders, inventory, B2B trading, payments, commission, and after-sales service from a single cloud dashboard — including the SolarCRM mobile field app for site engineers.

## Integrated Modules

### Marketing Leads & Meta Integration
Capture digital leads on a visual kanban pipeline. Meta Lead Ads integration brings Facebook and Instagram campaign leads directly into the system with source tracking, assignment, and follow-up.

### Inquiry Management
Convert qualified leads to inquiries with customer details, capacity, location, DISCOM, and site visit scheduling.

### Quotations
Create GST-ready solar quotations from inquiries with dynamic pricing, manager approval, and branded PDF output.

### Order Lifecycle
Manage orders from quotation conversion through confirmation, amendments, document collection, and payment schedules.

### Fabrication, Installation & Delivery
Track fabrication, field installation with serial capture, manager sign-off, and delivery challan dispatch.

### Payments & Outstanding
Record customer payments, track outstanding balances, payment audits, and follow-up reminders.

### Procurement & Inventory
Manage purchase orders, goods receipt, stock levels, serialized panel and inverter tracking, and warehouse transfers.

### B2B Trading
Handle dealer quotes, sales orders, shipments, invoices, and payment outstanding for B2B solar distribution.

### Commission Management
Configure commission rates, track accruals per order, manager review, and settlement payouts.

### Service & Warranty
Manage after-sales service tickets, warranty claims, spare parts requests, and service billing.

### Reports & Audit
Access dashboards, payment reports, delivery reports, B2B analytics, and full document audit trails.

### Document Outputs
Generate branded quotation PDFs, order documents, delivery challans, B2B invoices, payment receipts, and warranty cards.

## 8-Stage Workflow: Lead to Installation

1. **Lead Capture** (Marketing Leads & Meta) — Leads arrive via Meta campaigns, CSV import, or manual entry
2. **Inquiry Qualification** (Inquiry Management) — Convert leads with capacity, location, DISCOM data
3. **Site Assessment** (Follow-up & Site Visit) — On-site surveys and document attachment
4. **Commercial Proposal** (Quotations) — GST-ready quotations with manager approval
5. **Order Confirmation** (Order Lifecycle) — Stock reservation and payment schedule
6. **Field Execution** (Fabrication & Installation) — Serial capture and delivery challan
7. **Financial Closure** (Payments & Commission) — Payment collection and commission settlement
8. **After-Sales Service** (Service & Warranty) — Tickets and warranty claims

## Pricing

https://techhind.in/pricing

- Monthly Renewable: ₹14,999/month + tax (up to 200 users)
- Quarterly Renewable: ₹14,499/month + tax
- Half-Year Renewable: ₹13,999/month + tax
- Yearly Renewable: ₹12,999/month + tax (most popular)
- 14-day free trial, no credit card required

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Is techHind built specifically for solar companies?

Yes! techHind is built exclusively for Solar EPC companies in India. Unlike generic CRMs, every feature — from lead management to commissioning checklists — is designed around the solar project lifecycle.

### Does techHind support Meta (Facebook/Instagram) Lead Ads?

Yes. techHind Solar CRM integrates with Meta Lead Ads so campaign leads from Facebook and Instagram flow directly into your marketing lead pipeline with source tracking, assignment, and follow-up.

### Can I track solar panel and inverter serial numbers?

Yes. techHind supports serialized inventory tracking. Serial numbers are registered at goods receipt and linked to orders, installations, and warranty claims.

### Does techHind handle B2B dealer orders and invoicing?

Yes. The B2B Trading module covers dealer quotes, sales orders, shipments, invoices, and payment outstanding.

### What documents can techHind generate?

techHind generates branded quotation PDFs, order documents, delivery challans, B2B invoices, payment receipts, and warranty cards.

### Does techHind manage commission for sales partners?

Yes. Commission Management lets you configure rates, track accruals per order, route through manager approval, and settle payouts.

### What is the price of solar CRM in India?

techHind Solar CRM plans start from ₹12,999 per month (plus applicable taxes) on the yearly plan. See https://techhind.in/pricing

### How is techHind different from a generic CRM?

Unlike generic CRMs such as Zoho or HubSpot, techHind includes solar-specific workflows — site surveys, GST quotations, MNRE compliance, B2B trading, serialized inventory, commission management, and a mobile field app.
